---
title:  "Warren Wilson EColi Regression!!!!"
output: 
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: columns
    runtime: shiny
---
```{r, warning=F, message=F}
library(plotly)
library(tidyverse)
library(flexdashboard)
library(DT)
library(crosstalk)
library(sf)
library(leaflet)
library(stringr)
library(shiny)
source("functions.R")
```

```{r}

# data from predicing.Rmd
mt_data_wide<-read.csv("dashboard_data.csv", check.names = FALSE)

mt_data_wide<-mt_data_wide %>% mutate(ID = paste0("x", cur_group_id()), .by = Site) %>% relocate(ID, .after=Site)
mt_data_wide$Site<-as.factor(mt_data_wide$Site)

mt_data_wide <- mt_data_wide %>% mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(., 2)))
```

```{r} 
#first get everything data column encoded as numeric. 
mt_data_wide <- mt_data_wide %>% 
  mutate(across(6:last_col(), as.numeric))
```

```{r}
#we also need a long data set for ggplot:
mt_data_long<-mt_data_wide%>%pivot_longer(
  cols=6:last_col(),
  names_to="Date",
  values_to="Ecoli"
)
```

```{r}
# very roundabout way to get column names since they will change everyday
today_col_wide <- last(colnames(mt_data_wide))

mt_data_wide <- add_groups(mt_data_wide, today_col_wide)
today_group_col_wide <- last(colnames(mt_data_wide))

mt_data_long <- add_groups(mt_data_long, "Ecoli")
```




```{r}
output$mymap <- renderLeaflet({
  leaflet(mt_data_wide) %>% 
    addProviderTiles(providers$Stadia.OSMB) %>%
    addTiles() %>%
    addMarkers(
      lng = ~Longitude, 
      lat = ~Latitude,
      label = ~Site,
      layerId = ~ID)
})
```

```{r}
selected_site <- reactiveVal(NULL)

observeEvent(input$mymap_marker_click, {
  selected_site(input$mymap_marker_click$id)
})

observeEvent(input$mymap_click, {
  selected_site(NULL)
})

filtered_long <- reactive({
  site_id <- selected_site()
  if (is.null(site_id)) {
    return(mt_data_long) 
  } else {
    return(mt_data_long %>% filter(ID == site_id))
  }
})

filtered_wide <- reactive({
  site_id <- selected_site()
  if (is.null(site_id)) {
    return(mt_data_wide)
  } else {
    return(mt_data_wide %>% filter(ID == site_id))
  }
})
```

```{r}
output$timeseries <- renderPlotly({
  plot_ly(data = filtered_long(), x = ~Date, y = ~Ecoli,
               type = 'scatter', mode = 'lines', color=~Variable, colors = c("darkgreen", "orangered")) %>%
  layout(title = "Time Series",
         xaxis = list(title = "Date"),
         yaxis = list(title = "E. Coli"),
         showlegend = TRUE)
})

output$datatable <- renderDT({
   display_df <- filtered_wide()
   columns_to_keep <- colSums(!is.na(display_df)) > 0
   display_df <- display_df[, columns_to_keep, drop = FALSE]
    
  datatable(
    display_df %>% select(-c(ID, Latitude, Longitude)), 
    options = list(pageLength = 5, scrollX = TRUE)
  ) 
})
```
 
 
## {.sidebar}

Here is a basic   **dashboard**

  + Goal:  Visualize ecoli data
  + Status:  Not  AT ALL complete

## Column

### This is a map

```{r}
leafletOutput("mymap")
```

## Column

### My time series!! 
```{r}
plotlyOutput("timeseries")
```



### This is a datatable

This is so cool

```{r}
DTOutput("datatable")
```
